channel.title: Incomplete-Patterns on ErrorCode — Error Code Reference & Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Incomplete-Patterns on ErrorCode — Error Code Reference & Solutions

item.title: [Solution] Haskell Pattern Match Failure — Incomplete Pattern Error
item.description:
Pattern Match Failure — Incomplete Pattern Error

A pattern match failure occurs when a function encounters a value that none of its pattern matching cases handle. Haskell throws an IrrefutablePatternFailed exception at runtime.

Description

Haskell’s pattern matching is checked at compile time for completeness, but when -Wincomplete-patterns is not enabled or when using wildcard patterns, runtime failures can occur. When a value doesn’t match any case in a pattern, Haskell crashes with a pattern match failure.
